title: Rain Growth
description: Speed up plant growth time when its raining.
body:
# Rain Growth A minecraft mod that increases crop/plant random tick rates if they're exposed to rain (crops/plants will not grow faster if the rain cannot hit them). The tick rate can be adjusted with the gamerule _randomCropRainTickSpeed_. The default random tick speed is 4. Affected Plants: - Crops (Wheat, Beetroot, Carrots, etc) - Sugarcane - Saplings - Bamboo - Cocoa - Sweet Berry Bushes ### Info Rain Growth is server side but also works in singleplayer. \ \ ⚠️This is a **Fabric** only mod and there are no plans to make a forge version. \ \ \ ![Example](https://github.com/Declipsonator/Rain-Growth/blob/main/rain-growth.gif?raw=true "Example")

## Server Hosting! Kinetic Hosting is a minecraft serving hosting website with competitive prices. Get 10% off your first month when you use code "declip".
